programme.title: Heritage Falls
programme.desc: Three generations of totally opposite men go on a weekend 'retreat' at Heritage Falls and, in the process, are forced to get over their longstanding differences.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Torches, Stained Glass, Wind Chimes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Jill starts in Hilo, Hawaii where she meets Leilehua Yuen, a metal torch maker. Leilehua shows Jill the techniques she learned from her father that she continues to use today. In Denver, Colorado, Jill meets Phil Watkins, a traditional stained glass creator that is carrying on a centuries old family artistry. Finally, in Austin, Texas, she visits Davis and Franz Blanchard, a father and son team who create a special wind chime for Jill with a decidedly Texas melody.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - Illinois: Did you know ice cream sundae was given its name in Evanston, Illinois? Well, this week, singer and entertainer Taylor Hicks enjoys a few scoops of the creamy confection as he tastes his way across Illinois looking to discover the state's most emblematic foods. Come along as he visits the cornfields that produce the official state snack: popcorn. He also learns how to bake the perfect bread for the famous Italian beef sandwich, and he heads to the windy city to get the low down on deep-dish pizza and the Chicago-style hot dog. To top it all off, Taylor visits the birthplace of the ice cream sundae. It's a plateful of Illinois cuisine filled with the stories and legends behind the state's tastiest foods.

programme.title: Turquoise Fever
programme.desc: Turquoise Fever - Mo' Money, Mo' Problems: While prospecting for a new turquoise mine, the Ottesons discover an abundance of variscite, a gemstone that has recently grown in popularity. The family quickly gets to work to open their first variscite claim. The news of their promising discovery reaches Trenton when he's home with JaKell during the last days of her complicated pregnancy. With Trenton excited and anxious, JaKell assures him she will be fine if he goes out for the day to check out the new claim. For all their help and hard work, Donna and Danny give Tristan and Lane control of their very first mine. Eager to get started, the brothers set up their first dynamite blast, but due to their inexperience, the results are disappointing. Tony and Emily celebrate their tenth wedding anniversary in true Otteson fashion, searching for riches on their new claim.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - John Colter: King of the Mountain Men: As a member of Lewis and Clark's Corps of Discovery, John Colter travels from the Missouri River all the way to the Pacific Ocean, but he decides not to return to the civilized East when the expedition ends. Entranced by the beauty and adventure of the wild frontier, he becomes one of America's first mountain men. As a hunter, trapper and explorer in his own right, he's the first American to see the Grand Tetons and the epic Yellowstone Valley. While his epic explorations make him famous, it's a harrowing ordeal with Blackfeet warriors that makes him a legend. After boldly venturing into territory controlled by the Blackfeet tribe, Colter is captured, stripped naked, and forced to run for his life as warriors give chase in what will come to be known as Colter's Run.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - On a Mission: It's a rope-swinging episode of The Cowboy Way! After their restaurant venture, each of the cowboys takes some quality time to reconnect with family and discuss their futures. Cody decides to make the ranch high-tech, but will it be a success or will he get his wires crossed? Bubba plays locksmith for Booger's truck. A missing cow gets stuck in the woods. The guys use Booger's annual horse clinic as a way to give back to the community. And get ready for matchmaking the cowboy way! When the boys set up a mixer for bachelors Frankie and Hodge, speed-dating turns into a literal horse race to win the ladies' affections.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Blippi and The Holiday Snow Globe
programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah as they learn all about festive seasons for different people around the world! Learn about Christmas and decorate a tree with Santa, Learn about Kwanzaa with Baba The Storyteller and Hanukkah at The Westside Jewish Community Center!

programme.title: Berry Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest they are entering.

programme.title: Berry Bitty Adventurer
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Foods that are Super Powerful
programme.desc: Avery makes a power-packed dinner with Chef Robert Bartley who makes meals for Toronto's top sports teams. Lily stops at the Healthy Butcher for super-charged chicken and veggie sausages. Things heat up in the kitchen for the big chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Foods that are Wrapped
programme.desc: Can a meal be wrapped like a present? Lily finds out with Chef John Klianis when they prepare Spanakotiropita. Avery makes authentic Mexican tacos at La Tortilleria. Together with Matt, they wrap things up with meals in a package, or “En Papillotte” as the French say.

programme.title: A Surprise Visit, Stolen Treasure, A Flower For Olive
programme.desc: EP16: When Tijinou and Tijibelle lands on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate announces to them a huge surprise: the visit of Anoki the Inuit! EP17: Lil'Pirate takes big steps on the beach, including when Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive. And three steps towards the North! Then two steps towards the East! Then ten steps due South! Lil'Pirate arrives at the foot of the rock. One-thousand sardines! His treasure is there! He's sure of it! EP18: When Tijinou and Tijibelle arrive in the area surrounding the lighthouse, they notice Pauline the Octopus on the rocks, the 5 tentacles clinging to the ground, like stumps, and the body tense like a tent…

programme.title: Percival's Island, Bracelet for Olive, The Princess's Crown
programme.desc: EP19: When Tijinou and Tijibelle land on Lil'Pirate's beach, Lil'Pirate leads them to his favorite hideout: shhhh! He has a secret! He looks all around him, there's no one! He takes out a map! It's the map to go on a fabulous and magical island...EP20: For the birthday of Pauline the Octopus, Edmond wants to offer her a bracelet made of shells.EP21: The princess has broken a little part of her crown. Tijinou and Tijibelle will have to find the clown with the glue to repair it.

programme.title: Blippi Visits Rhythm Discovery Center
programme.desc: Make music with Blippi in this episode on percussion.

programme.title: High Tech Drama
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: A Berry Merry Birthday
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: The Magic Rainbow -Winx Club
programme.desc: As an important ball is taking place at Domino Castle, Kalshara and Brafilius are at Graynor Ruins to catch the Creature with the Rainbow Coat, in order to absorb its magic power. However, Kalshara's attempt fails, unleashing chaos between Wild Magic and Fairy magic, making the colours of Magix big rainbow blur into each other. Warned by Roxy, the Winx and their Fairy Animals enter the Rainbow MiniWorld: Musa and Critty manage to restore the balance of that magic place, thanks to their special magic sensitivity. In order to thank the Winx, the Creature with the Rainbow Coat reveals the Winx (being spied upon by Kalshara and Brafilius) that the Animal with the Ultimate Power is strictly linked to the fairies' power.

programme.title: Baby Winx -Winx Club
programme.desc: Kalshara e Brafilius think that the Animal with the Ultimate Power is one of the Fairy Animals bonded with the Winx. After setting a trap to the six fairies, Brafilius casts a time-reversal spell on their Stones of Memories, making the Winx turn back into little girls. As the Specialists, seeing them, mistake them for young tourists of the Animal Rescue Park, Kalshara easily catches their Fairy Animals… except for Bloom's unicorn. Despite the fact they are only little girls, the Winx manage to send away Brafilius with their magic, creating a funny circus show, and Elas attacks Kalshara, convincing her to leave. Bloom's unicorn, with his power, finally manages to make the Winx turn back to normal.

programme.title: A Basket of Blueberries
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying! Unaware that Strawberry has promised Blueberry she'll take care of Huck at the ball, and feeling sorry for their friend, Lemon and Raspberry independently decide to dress up like Blueberry and fill in for her—neither knowing that the other is also doing so!

programme.title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. “I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!” says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed. To mark the occasion, and to honor all that Berrykin Bloom has done for Berry Bitty City, she decrees that they will have a Berrykin Bloom day, and there will be a ceremony in his honor. Berrykin Bloom is very humble about the whole thing, but the girls wish there was something special they could do to help honor him on his big day.

programme.title: Food that make you Pucker
programme.desc: In this sour half-hour, Avery and Chef Winlai Wong make Pork Pot Stickers with a sour vinegar sauce. Lily follows a cucumber's journey to becoming a sour pickle at a pickle factory. In the kitchen, Matt challenges them to make fruity ice pops with serious pucker power.

programme.title: Foods that make you Smile
programme.desc: Some foods just put a smile on your face! For Avery, it's mini carrot cupcakes with Chef Morag Cleevely. Lily is all smiles while visiting a chocolate maker. Then it's cooking time with Matt, where they make 3 kinds of delicious fries that are actually good for you!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.sub-title: Kids Diana Show | Princess of Play!
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: Wow, I Never Knew That!
programme.desc: A whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed with exciting tidbits and fascinating facts that uncover the truths and origins behind the stuff you're already familiar with.

programme.title: The Shadownsters
programme.desc: Solomon and Gretta are ready to get some sleep. When their father switches off the light, Gretta falls asleep and Solomon, very scared, tries to hide under the sheets. Suddenly, he hears a weird noise. Solomon is frightened and calls Pancho, his reliable plush, who comes to life and helps him to discover a terrible monster, a Shadownster.

programme.title: KIDZ BOP Kids
programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.title: Bubble Bip
programme.desc: The hilarious adventures of Bubble Bip, a video game hero who slings bubbles at sassy squids, and the zany group of Earth kids he makes friends with.

programme.title: Underwater Demolition Mission!! (Minecraft Island Survival) Part 15
programme.desc: Let's play Minecraft Hardcore Survival! In this episode, the Pink Sheep Clan SEAL Team carries out a dangerous underwater demolition mission to acquire Prismarine from an Ocean monument!

programme.title: Patronus the Magic Cat! (Minecraft Island Survival) Part 7
programme.desc: Let's play Minecraft Hardcore Survival! In this episode, we sail west to find a Cat to tame (and name Patronus) to scare away the Dementors! (aka Phantoms)

programme.title: Pop It!
programme.desc: "Pop It!" interactive dance-along TV series for kids age 6 to 11 that offers fun, exercise and entertainment.

programme.title: Limon and Oli
programme.desc: Sweet little Limon and her rambunctious friend Oli look for snow monsters, hunt for treasure, learn to play musical instruments and more.

programme.title: Hip Hop Harry Music Videos: Brush Your Teeth / Share Alike 3D / Head Shoulders Knees & Toes / Old MacDonald / Wheels On The Bus
programme.desc: Enjoy this sing-along all about brushing your teeth and proper mouth hygiene from Hip Hop Harry! Remember to always brush your teeth! / Learn about manners and how to share with this great kids sing-along from Hip Hop Harry! Observe how the kids share in the video and then share with your own friends! / This nursery rhyme will teach you about your body parts and where they are on your body. Sing and dance along with Hip Hop Harry and the kids. The song will speed up slowly, try to keep up! / Hip Hop Harry's Old MacDonald is a classic nursery rhyme sing along for the little ones. This is a great way to learn about farm animals! / Hip Hop Harry's Wheels On The Bus is a great nursery rhyme sing along for the little ones. Not only can you sing along, but you can also dance along to the choreography.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants: Bunny Family Wedding, My Carrots, Puppy Detective
programme.desc: Pants the puppy is adopted. His parents are bunnies. But it is not until Pants the puppy goes to a family wedding, that he realizes every member of his family, but him, is a bunny. When Monsieur LaFleur gets Apricot's help to film a carrot commercial, he worries that he's dropping his carrots too much. Pants is the Puppy Detective, no mystery is too mysterious for his puppy nose! But is his nose suspect number one in why he's not solving the case?

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.sub-title: Music Videos Series 1: Save The Day! / The PJ Masks Are Here / Heroes Forever / Make Your Move / Shine on Everyone / Time to be a Hero
programme.desc: Sing along with the PJ Masks and his friends!

programme.title: Todd World: Stella's Bad Dream

programme.title: HeyKids: The Lion and the Mouse

programme.title: Counting With Paula: Camping Day
programme.desc: Paula and Friends are packing to go camping in the garden. They learn more about things to take note of when camping. Tim sets a fire and the fire spreads. Can the children have a safe and happy campi

programme.title: Cocomelon: JJ's Animal Time: Wheels on the Bus / Mimi's Rocket to the Moon
programme.desc: Enjoy a lively ride on the bus and then experience "Twinkle Twinkle Little Star" in the world of Animal Time.

programme.title: Happy Camper Live: 365 Days of Camp: Ready, Set, Repair, Jam & Faceoff!
programme.desc: Hey Happy Campers! Today at camp we're having a magical time! Learn how to repair rubberbands and write a song with a guitar! Plus, get tips on winning faceoffs in lacrosse! Join us for a fun-filled day of activities!

programme.title: Little Angel: Pyjama Party / What Flavor Is This? / Opposites Song (Open And Shut)
programme.desc: Baby John has a Pyjama Party where him and his friends end up making a mess all over the kitchen. / Baby John learns all about different flavors. / Baby John, the fish, and Bingo the dog use open and shut in their daily lives.

programme.title: Balloopo: Puffer Pop/ Fruit Rain
programme.desc: PUFFER POP Paru catches a Puffer Pop fish who pops things when no one is looking. FRUIT RAIN After trying to out-do Poppys planting skills, Paru accidentally drops all his fruit seeds on top of a cloud

programme.title: Masha and the Bear: Gone Fishing / Call Me Please!
programme.desc: The Bear goes fishing. In anticipation he slings his fishing rod but as soon as the first fish swallows the bait, Masha appears and transforms a pleasant fishing trip into a nightmare. The Bear makes a fishing rod for Masha as well in order to entertain her and she immediately catches the Goldfish. / A funny interpretation of an old fable about a boy who called for help and shouted "Wolves!"The Bear wants to watch a soccer game but first he needs to get rid of the girl. The Bear sends her for a walk to the forest and gives her a cell phone in order to be safe. As a result Masha annoys him with her calls for any trivial reasons and when she finds herself in real danger, the Bear doesn't an-swer the phone ...

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: Super Helpful
programme.desc: After declaring himself the town Fixer-Upper, Chip is laser focused on fixing every item on Eagle Creek's To Do list. Problem is he never takes the time to find out what exactly his neighbours need done. So instead of inflating a flat tire or patching a leaky tent, he's creating all new problems and making things way worse! Before Chip knows it, he and Mr. Crumple are in a sup'ed up, runaway Sweepy, careening through town. Help! It's Inkie and Luna to the rescue! But first they need to ask a sheepish Chip exactly what kind of help he needs. Um, fixing all his fixes?!

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Too Hot To Handle / The Big Squeak
programme.desc: Findley can't resist some freshly baked cookies that are too hot to eat. / Avocado's new toy is driving everyone crazy with its noisy squeaker.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of Esmeralda the Snake
programme.desc: A neat & tidy snake regrets her kind offer of a shared burrow when Herbert the Warthog moves in. Disaster strikes and they are both made homeless. Only then do they appreciate what they had together.

programme.title: Mia: A Gift for Grandma / The Right Team
programme.desc: Mia wants to help her grandmother go faster by upgrading her wheelchair. / Mr. Mole has a bicycle to give away, but everyone wants it. So, he designs a contest to decide who will get it.

programme.title: Gummibar & Friends: The Easter Funny Bunny / The Egg / Hamster in the House
programme.desc: Where's the Easter Bunny? And what are chocolate bunny eggs? Gummy and Friends are about to find out. / Gummy wakes up with a mysterious egg in his bedroom and, over Harrys objections, becomes convinced that its Junior, a future soccer star! / Friendly and lovable mad scientist Granny Peters accidentally transforms her cute little pet hamster.... into a not-so-cute HUGE pet hamster - and things get interesting when it escapes and decides to move into Gummy's place uninvited.

programme.title: Origanimals
programme.desc: Help an overwhelmed Capybara to babysit 4 young baby capybaras and get her tasks done. Not taking on too many things that one can handle.

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm: Caterpillar Butterfly song / Yoga / Fruity Ice Cream Song / Five Little Ducks
programme.desc: Ella is enjoying watching a caterpillar eating an apple on a tree but after she returns with a flower for it to nibble, she discovers her little friend has gone! Bee points to the cocoon hanging from a leaf. Ella and Bee watch in wonder as the cocoon opens and a beautiful butterfly emerges! / In this mindful video, Rishi's Mum holds a yoga class at the farm. She teaches three positions to Ella, Rishi, Pablo and Lettie. They learn the Downward Facing Dog, Warrior Three and The Butterfly. The students are all naturals - well, all except Lettie. It appears sheep are not very good at yoga! / It's a hot day so Woolly Sheep sets up an ice cream stall outside Lellobee City Farm. Ella, Rishi, Lettie and Carlos bring Woolly fresh apples, oranges, bananas and cherries from the farm so Woolly can make them delicious and refreshing fruity ice cream. / Ella, Mama Duck and the five little ducklings are having a game of Hide and Seek. The ducklings hide all around the farm - on Heidi's hat, in the vegetable patch, on a hay bail, on Carlo's guitar and among some flowers. Will Ella and Mama Duck be able to find them?

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: In the sitcom "Schitt's Creek," a wealthy couple -- video store magnate Johnny and his soap opera star wife Moira -- suddenly find themselves completely broke. With only one remaining asset, a small town called Schitt's Creek, which the Roses bought years earlier as a joke, this once-wealthy couple must give up life as they know it. With their two spoiled children in tow and their pampered lives behind them, the Rose family is forced to face their newfound poverty head-on and come together as a family to survive.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Warm, loyal PR executive Kate and her longtime friend, no-nonsense psychiatrist Anne, attend a judgmental mommies' group, where they meet timid IT tech Jenny and blindly optimistic real estate agent Frankie. The four quickly form an unlikely friendship, sharing struggles of urban motherhood filled with the chaos of toddlers, tantrums, careers, and identity crises, all while trying to achieve the holy grail: a sense of self. The ensemble comedy is largely drawn from the personal experiences of star/co-creator Catherine Reitman ("Blackish," "It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia").

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Qualified to teach gym class, Gerry Duncan is instead hired in the social studies department of the prestigious Xavier Academy, a private school for kids in grades 5-12. Gerry struggles to stay ahead of his students as he fakes his way through each class, having decided that he knows enough to get by, and he can just improvise everything else. A comedic take on the profession, "Mr. D" shows teaching from a teacher's perspective and reveals the truth: teachers just don't know everything. The series is based on Gerry Dee's life as a high-school teacher before he became a stand-up comic.

programme.title: Mr. D

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited junior high world.

programme.title: Robert Mac
programme.desc: Robert's award-winning comedy is smart, subtle, and silly. Not too smart and not too subtle, but occasionally a bit more silly than youíd expect. And always clean. Robert is a regular at some of the finest comedy clubs around the country. Winner of "Comedy Centralís Laugh Riots." Finalist at "Billy Crystalís Mr. Saturday Night Contest", "San Francisco International Comedy Competition", "Boston Comedy Festival", "Jerry Lewis MDA Telethon Talent Search."

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: My Friend Dahmer

programme.title: Back Roads
programme.desc: A young man cares for his younger sisters after their mother is imprisoned for murdering their abusive father. When he strikes up an affair with a married woman, long-dormant family secrets bubble to the surface in this noir thriller.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Airplane VS Volcano
programme.desc: When a commercial airliner is trapped within a ring of erupting volcanoes, the passengers and crew must find a way to survive - without landing.

programme.title: Day the Earth Stopped, The
programme.desc: Hundreds of massive intergalactic robots appear in all of the major world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed.

programme.title: 8213: Gacy House
programme.desc: A group of paranormal investigators enter the home of serial killer John Gacy, hoping to find evidence of paranormal activity. As the evening progresses it seems the investigators are not prepared for the horror still within the house.

programme.title: Countdown: Armageddon
programme.desc: A journalist searches for her daughter as a series of catastrophic disasters push a destabilized society toward the brink of global war.

programme.title: 3 Musketeers
programme.desc: Alexandra D'Artagnan, junior NSA officer, uncovers a plot to assasinate the President of the United States and enlists the help of three infamous international spies to stop the threat.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain (martial arts legend Jackie Chan) must spring into action when an elaborate kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes. Subtitled.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: When a gamer accidentally opens a portal into a side-scroller, she becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison. To escape, she must finish the game with help from her not-so-savvy friend on the outside...or remain a 16-bit character forever.

programme.title: American Yakuza 2: Back to Back
programme.desc: After an ex-cop (Michael Rooker, "Guardians of the Galaxy") finds himself caught up in a battle between Japanese mobsters and local thugs, he discovers that he was framed by a corrupt cop.

programme.title: The Bounty Men
programme.desc: Daniel King, a retired militiaman, rides to a deserted Texas town to track his latest bounty, a powerful war criminal named John Dooling.

programme.title: Point Blank
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke and Danny Trejo star in this action-packed drama about a gang of psychotic criminals who break out of prison and take control of a Texas shopping mall.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Dennis Nilsen
programme.desc: Dennis Andrew Nilsen was a Scottish serial killer and necrophile who murdered at least twelve young men and boys between 1978 and 1983 in London.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: This documentary explores the lives of three different women who have been killed walking home.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: In 1945, the world was ushered into the atomic age. With his role as the Father of the Bomb solidified, Oppenheimer became increasingly worried about the potential danger that scientific inventions could pose to humanity.

programme.title: Chicago 10
programme.desc: Archival footage, animation, and music are used to look back at the eight anti-war protesters who were put on trial following the 1968 Democratic National Convention.

programme.title: Feels Good Man
programme.desc: When Pepe the Frog becomes an unwitting icon of hate, his creator fights to bring Pepe back from the darkness.

programme.title: Because We're Done
programme.desc: A married man going thru a mid life crisis believes that the fate of his marriage rest solely in his hands. Only to learn that the ultimate decision will be made by his wife.

programme.title: Florrie
programme.desc: Florrie is dating 3 men. Juggling these men is catching up with her as is her complicated past. Her best friend Henrietta demands she picks just one of the committed boyfriends. Why is Florrie not able to accept love from any of these men?

programme.title: Love Possibly
programme.desc: Love possibly follows Alex, a hopelessly romantic, rom-com obsessed virgin on a quest to find love. Alex quickly finds himself out of his depth when Lana, a Moldovan mail-order bride makes the bold decision to move to London to marry him.

programme.title: The Bet
programme.desc: A woman makes a bet with her husband that she can get the next man she sees to propose. enter Albert, a lonely, eccentric man who believes he will never be loved, in this delightful, hilarious film about marriage, love and second chances.

programme.title: Murderers' Row
programme.desc: Matt Helm rescues the kidnapped inventor of an ultra-destructive "helio beam" capable of destroying Washington D.C.

programme.title: A Woman Of Distinction
programme.desc: A publicist's efforts to create a buzz about a British astronomer's visit create personal and professional problems for a career-minded dean of a women's college.

programme.title: Three For The Show
programme.desc: A Broadway musical comedy star marries her dead husband's songwriting partner, only to have husband number one show up at the wedding.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A self-pitying, drunken composer finds inspiration in a new woman only to have his ex-wife decide that she now wants him back.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.desc: Our best, most popular TED content over the years. 1) We're building a dystopia just to make people click on ads | Zeynep Tufekci 2) How technology changes our sense of right and wrong | Juan Enriquez 3) How technology can fight extremism and online harassment | Yasmin Green 4) How NASA invented a ventilator for COVID-19 ... in 37 days | Dan Goods

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild
programme.desc: Be inspired to go out and rediscover the wonders of the natural world -- and get a deeper understanding of where (and why) the wild things grow. 1) How humans and animals can live together | Jane Goodall 2) The secret sex lives of pandas | Lucy Cooke 3) Why do animals have such different lifespans? - Joao Pedro de Magalhaes 4) How life on Earth adapts to you and me | Shane Campbell-Staton 5) Would you raise the baby that ate your siblings? | Francesca Barbero

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) How do you know what's true? | Sheila Marie Orfano 2) The link between inequality and anxiety | Richard Wilkinson 3) How climate change affects your mental health | Britt Wray 4) When do kids start to care about other people's opinions? | Sara Valencia Botto 5) Should you trust unanimous decisions? - Derek Abbott 6) Why our screens make us less happy | Adam Alter 7) 3 lessons on decision-making from a poker champion | Liv Boeree

programme.title: Under the Microscope
programme.desc: Shrink down to the micro and nano universes, and discover an entirely new world of possibility. 1) These bacteria eat plastic | Morgan Vague 2) Soon we'll cure diseases with a cell, not a pill | Siddhartha Mukherjee 3) How can we solve the antibiotic resistance crisis? | Gerry Wright 4) The tiny balls of fat that could revolutionize medicine | Kathryn A. Whitehead 5) Why I make robots the size of a grain of rice | Sarah Bergbreiter

programme.title: The Creative Zone
programme.desc: What makes us create and innovate? Here, wildly creative thinkers share ideas and insights into what kindles genius. 1) What's it like to be a giant sequoia tree? | Ersin Han Ersin 2) How creative writing can help you through life's hardest moments | Sakinah Hofler 3) How to use a semicolon - Emma Bryce 4) How a strong creative industry helps economies thrive | Mehret Mandefro 5) Everything around you can become a computer | Ivan Poupyrev
